findings: Metaswarm launch phrasing is explicit: commander panes plus a full SS-250 child swarm per commander.
Bounded spawning is encoded with constraints.max_workers=250 and depth_budget.squads_allocated=50.
No-silent-downgrade behavior is explicit; under-launch must report partial or failed.
Sub-agent telemetry/proof is explicitly required via swarm-state.json and child-agents.jsonl per commander.
Live worker liveness counts are present in monitor output, but Agent Pulse terminology is not explicit.
Model parsing/default exists, but the skill text does not itself spell out premium-only or banned-model enforcement.
Teardown/resume/cleanup behavior is surfaced in command grammar and flow.
No collaboration-bus creation phrasing appears in this file.
